headline: Amadou Onana
body: 🚨 Amadou Onana set for spell on sidelines after suffering ACL rupture in Belgium win over USMNT at FIFAWorldCup. Huge blow for 24yo midfielder, national team & Aston Villa. AVFC did not plan to recruit in that area but will now reassess TheAthleticFC nytimes.com/athletic/7427468… Link Aston Villa’s Amadou Onana sustains ACL injury during Belgium’s World Cup win Onana, 24, was forced off in the 21st minute of Belgium's last-16 victory. nytimes.com
raw_text:
🚨 Amadou Onana set for spell on sidelines after suffering ACL rupture in #Belgium win over #USMNT at #FIFAWorldCup. Huge blow for 24yo midfielder, national team & Aston Villa. #AVFC did not plan to recruit in that area but will now reassess @TheAthleticFC nytimes.com/athletic/7427468…

Link



Aston Villa’s Amadou Onana sustains ACL injury during Belgium’s World Cup win

Onana, 24, was forced off in the 21st minute of Belgium's last-16 victory.
nytimes.com
